name: Bacon Cheese Muffins
recipeIngredient: In a large bowl, whisk together wet ingredients: 3/4 cup Milk, 1/4 cup Sugar.
Add the beaten egg and milk to the mixture. Set aside.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease or line a muffin tin with parchment paper, leaving 3/4 full.
3. In a large bowl, combine dry ingredients: flour and cereal. Make a well in the center.
4. Pour in the wet mixture from step 1 into the well.
5. Stir just until moistened (lumpy).
6. Fold in crumbled bacon and cereal.
7. Divide batter evenly among prepared muffin cups.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Makes 12 muffins.
